infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: పంచాంగం గణనల కోసం మీ స్థానం అవసరం — సూర్యోదయం/సూర్యాస్తమయం సమయాలు

web.name: Dharma: Telugu Astro, Calendar & Gold
web.description: Free Telugu Panchangam app with daily Tithi, Nakshatram, Yogam, Karanam, Muhurtam timings, festival calendar, Ekadashi dates, gold prices, and Bhagavad Gita slokas.

expo.description: Telugu Panchangam (తెలుగు పంచాంగం) with astronomically accurate Tithi, Nakshatram, Yogam, Karanam, Rahu Kalam, Sunrise/Sunset times. Includes 2026 festival calendar, Ekadashi tracker, Muhurtam finder, gold & silver prices, Bhagavad Gita slokas, kids stories, and daily deity darshan. Based on Drik Ganita astronomical calculations with Lahiri Ayanamsa.
